files.mux_4to1.v:
module mux_4to1(
    input d0,
    input d1,
    input d2,
    input d3,
    input [1:0] sel,
    output y
    );

    assign y = (sel == 2'b00) ? d0 :
               (sel == 2'b01) ? d1 :
               (sel == 2'b10) ? d2 :
               d3;
endmodule
files.mux_4to1_combined.v:
module mux_4to1(
    input d0,
    input d1,
    input d2,
    input d3,
    input [1:0] sel,
    output y
    );

    assign y = (sel == 2'b00) ? d0 :
               (sel == 2'b01) ? d1 :
               (sel == 2'b10) ? d2 :
               d3;
endmodule

files.asic_dmux3.v:
module asic_dmux3 #(parameter PROP = "DEFAULT")   (
    input  sel2,
    input  sel1,
    input  sel0,
    input  in2,
    input  in1,
    input  in0,
    output out
    );

   assign out = sel0 & in0 |
		sel1 & in1 |
		sel2 & in2;

endmodule

    input  sel0,
    input  in2,
    input  in1,
    input  in0,
    output out
    );

   assign out = sel0 & in0 |
		sel1 & in1 |
		sel2 & in2;

endmodule

module autovcoder_054419 (

      .c0(1'b0),

        Data_in[23],
        Data_in[22],

        Data_in[19],
        Data_in[18],
        Data_in[17],
        Data_in[16],
        Data_in[15],
        Data_in[14],

      }),
      .i_b({

      }),

  );

files.autovcoder_081494.v:
module autovcoder_081494
#(
   parameter DW = 1,
   parameter AW = 0,
   parameter [DW*(1<<AW)-1:0] RST_VECTOR = {DW*(1<<AW){1'b0}},
   parameter NUM_WRITE = 0
)
(
   input CLK,
   input RST,
   input [NUM_WRITE-1:0] WE,
   input [AW*NUM_WRITE-1:0] WADDR,
   input [DW*NUM_WRITE-1:0] WDATA,
   output [DW*(1<<AW)-1:0] DO
);
   reg [DW-1:0] regfile [(1<<AW)-1:0];
   genvar i;
   integer j;
   
`ifdef NCPU_RST_ASYNC
 `ifdef NCPU_RST_POS_POLARITY
   always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
 `else // neg polarity
   always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST) begin
 `endif
`else // synchronous
   always @(posedge CLK) begin
`endif
`ifdef NCPU_RST_POS_POLARITY
      if (RST)
`else // neg polarity
      if (~RST)
`endif
         begin
            for(j=0;j<(1<<AW);j=j+1)
               regfile[j] <= RST_VECTOR[j*DW +: DW];
         end
      else
         for(j=0;j<NUM_WRITE;j=j+1) // This generates a priority MUX to resolve WAW hazard, if we have multiple write ports.
            if (WE[j])
               regfile[WADDR[j*AW +: AW]] <= WDATA[j*DW +: DW];
   end
   
   generate for(i=0;i<(1<<AW);i=i+1)
      begin : gen_do
         assign DO[i * DW +: DW] = regfile[i];
      end
   endgenerate
   
endmodule

files.autovcoder_010120.v:
module autovcoder_010120 (
    input wire [255:0] bits,
    input wire target,
    input wire direction,
    output wire hit,
    output wire [7:0] index
);

  wire [3:0] hit_inner;
  wire [5:0] index_inner [3:0];
  wire [1:0] index_upper;

  bit_searcher_64
      BS0 (
          .bits(bits[63:0]),
          .target(target),
          .direction(direction),
          .hit(hit_inner[0]),
          .index(index_inner[0])
      ),
      BS1 (
          .bits(bits[127:64]),
          .target(target),
          .direction(direction),
          .hit(hit_inner[1]),
          .index(index_inner[1])
      ),
      BS2 (
          .bits(bits[191:128]),
          .target(target),
          .direction(direction),
          .hit(hit_inner[2]),
          .index(index_inner[2])
      ),
      BS3 (
          .bits(bits[255:192]),
          .target(target),
          .direction(direction),
          .hit(hit_inner[3]),
          .index(index_inner[3])
      );
  bit_searcher_4 BS4 (
      .bits(hit_inner[3:0]),
      .target(1'b1),
      .direction(direction),
      .hit(hit),
      .index(index_upper)
  );

  assign index = {index_upper, index_inner[index_upper]};

endmodule

files.rtlpp_03431.v:
module rtlpp_03431(
  input aclk,
  input aresetn,
  input [31:0] s_axi_awaddr,
  input [2:0] s_axi_awprot,
  input s_axi_awvalid,
  output s_axi_awready,
  input [31:0] s_axi_wdata,
  input [3:0] s_axi_wstrb,
  input s_axi_wvalid,
  output s_axi_wready,
  output [1:0] s_axi_bresp,
  output s_axi_bvalid,
  input s_axi_bready,
  input [31:0] s_axi_araddr,
  input [2:0] s_axi_arprot,
  input s_axi_arvalid,
  output s_axi_arready,
  output [31:0] s_axi_rdata,
  output [1:0] s_axi_rresp,
  output s_axi_rvalid,
  input s_axi_rready,
  output [159:0] m_axi_awaddr,
  output [14:0] m_axi_awprot,
  output [4:0] m_axi_awvalid,
  input [4:0] m_axi_awready,
  output [159:0] m_axi_wdata,
  output [19:0] m_axi_wstrb,
  output [4:0] m_axi_wvalid,
  input [4:0] m_axi_wready,
  input [9:0] m_axi_bresp,
  input [4:0] m_axi_bvalid,
  output [4:0] m_axi_bready,
  output [159:0] m_axi_araddr,
  output [14:0] m_axi_arprot,
  output [4:0] m_axi_arvalid,
  input [4:0] m_axi_arready,
  input [159:0] m_axi_rdata,
  input [9:0] m_axi_rresp,
  input [4:0] m_axi_rvalid,
  output [4:0] m_axi_rready
);

  // Internal logic for controlling input and output signals
  // This is a simplified example and may not reflect the actual functionality
  // of a real AXI crossbar switch.

  // Handshake processes for write address channel
  assign s_axi_awready = 1'b0; // ready signal is low for simplicity
  assign s_axi_wready  = 1'b0; // ready signal is low for simplicity
  assign s_axi_bresp   = 2'b00; // okay response
  assign s_axi_bvalid  = 1'b0; // valid signal is low for simplicity

  // Handshake processes for read address channel
  assign s_axi_arready = 1'b0; // ready signal is low for simplicity
  assign s_axi_rdata   = 32'b0; // default data
  assign s_axi_rresp   = 2'b00; // okay response
  assign s_axi_rvalid  = 1'b0; // valid signal is low for simplicity

  // Assign values to master interfaces (simple pass-through logic for example)
  assign m_axi_awaddr  = 160'b0; // 5 x 32-bit addresses concatenated
  assign m_axi_awprot  = 15'b0; // 5 x 3-bit protection concatenated
  assign m_axi_awvalid = 5'b0; // valid signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_wdata   = 160'b0; // 5 x 32-bit data concatenated
  assign m_axi_wstrb   = 20'b0; // 5 x 4-bit strobes concatenated
  assign m_axi_wvalid  = 5'b0; // valid signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_bready  = 5'b0; // ready signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_araddr  = 160'b0; // 5 x 32-bit addresses concatenated
  assign m_axi_arprot  = 15'b0; // 5 x 3-bit protection concatenated
  assign m_axi_arvalid = 5'b0; // valid signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_rready  = 5'b0; // ready signals for all masters

endmodule
files.rtlpp_03431_combined.v:

  input aclk,

  input [2:0] s_axi_awprot,

  output s_axi_awready,
  input [31:0] s_axi_wdata,
  input [3:0] s_axi_wstrb,

  assign s_axi_wready  = 1'b0; // ready signal is low for simplicity
  assign s_axi_bresp   = 2'b00; // okay response
  assign s_axi_bvalid  = 1'b0; // valid signal is low for simplicity

  // Handshake processes for read address channel
  assign s_axi_arready = 1'b0; // ready signal is low for simplicity
  assign s_axi_rdata   = 32'b0; // default data
  assign s_axi_rresp   = 2'b00; // okay response
  assign s_axi_rvalid  = 1'b0; // valid signal is low for simplicity

  assign m_axi_awaddr  = 160'b0; // 5 x 32-bit addresses concatenated
  assign m_axi_awprot  = 15'b0; // 5 x 3-bit protection concatenated
  assign m_axi_awvalid = 5'b0; // valid signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_wdata   = 160'b0; // 5 x 32-bit data concatenated

  assign m_axi_wvalid  = 5'b0; // valid signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_bready  = 5'b0; // ready signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_araddr  = 160'b0; // 5 x 32-bit addresses concatenated
  assign m_axi_arprot  = 15'b0; // 5 x 3-bit protection concatenated
  assign m_axi_arvalid = 5'b0; // valid signals for all masters
  assign m_axi_rready  = 5'b0; // ready signals for all masters

module rtlpp_02521 (
  input aclk,
  input aresetn,
  input [39:0]s_axi_awaddr,
  input [7:0]s_axi_awlen,
  input [2:0]s_axi_awsize,
  input [1:0]s_axi_awburst,
  input [0:0]s_axi_awlock,
  input [3:0]s_axi_awcache,
  input [2:0]s_axi_awprot,
  input [3:0]s_axi_awregion,
  input [3:0]s_axi_awqos,
  input s_axi_awvalid,
  output reg s_axi_awready,
  input [31:0]s_axi_wdata,
  input [3:0]s_axi_wstrb,
  input s_axi_wlast,
  input s_axi_wvalid,
  output reg s_axi_wready,
  output reg [1:0]s_axi_bresp,
  output reg s_axi_bvalid,
  input s_axi_bready,
  input [39:0]s_axi_araddr,
  input [7:0]s_axi_arlen,
  input [2:0]s_axi_arsize,
  input [1:0]s_axi_arburst,
  input [0:0]s_axi_arlock,
  input [3:0]s_axi_arcache,
  input [2:0]s_axi_arprot,
  input [3:0]s_axi_arregion,
  input [3:0]s_axi_arqos,
  input s_axi_arvalid,
  output reg s_axi_arready,
  output reg [31:0]s_axi_rdata,
  output reg [1:0]s_axi_rresp,
  output reg s_axi_rlast,
  output reg s_axi_rvalid,
  input s_axi_rready,
  output reg [39:0]m_axi_awaddr,
  output reg [2:0]m_axi_awprot,
  output reg m_axi_awvalid,
  input m_axi_awready,
  output reg [31:0]m_axi_wdata,
  output reg [3:0]m_axi_wstrb,
  output reg m_axi_wvalid,
  input m_axi_wready,
  input [1:0]m_axi_bresp,
  input m_axi_bvalid,
  output reg m_axi_bready,
  output reg [39:0]m_axi_araddr,
  output reg [2:0]m_axi_arprot,
  output reg m_axi_arvalid,
  input m_axi_arready,
  input [31:0]m_axi_rdata,
  input [1:0]m_axi_rresp,
  input m_axi_rvalid,
  output reg m_axi_rready
);

// Internal logic for handling AXI transactions should be added here
always @(posedge aclk or negedge aresetn) begin
  if (!aresetn) begin
    // Reset logic
    s_axi_awready <= 0;
    s_axi_wready <= 0;
    s_axi_bvalid <= 0;
    s_axi_bresp <= 2'b0;
    s_axi_arready <= 0;
    s_axi_rvalid <= 0;
    s_axi_rresp <= 2'b0;
    s_axi_rlast <= 0;
    s_axi_rdata <= 32'b0;
    m_axi_awaddr <= 40'b0;
    m_axi_awprot <= 3'b0;
    m_axi_awvalid <= 0;
    m_axi_wdata <= 32'b0;
    m_axi_wstrb <= 4'b0;
    m_axi_wvalid <= 0;
    m_axi_bready <= 0;
    m_axi_araddr <= 40'b0;
    m_axi_arprot <= 3'b0;
    m_axi_arvalid <= 0;
    m_axi_rready <= 0;
  end else begin
    // Logic for handling each signal based on AXI protocol
    // To be implemented by developers based on exact AXI transactions needed
  end
end

endmodule

module origen_134121 (
    input sys0_clkp,
    input sys0_clkn,
    input pci0_clkp,
    input pci0_clkn,
    input pci0_rstn,
    input ppsExtIn,
    output [7:0] pci_exp_txp,
    output [7:0] pci_exp_txn,
    input [7:0] pci_exp_rxp,
    input [7:0] pci_exp_rxn,
    output [2:0] led,
    output ppsOut
);

    wire gps_ppsSyncOut;

    // Instantiate mkFTop_alder module
    mkFTop_alder mkFTop_alder_inst (
        .sys0_clkp(sys0_clkp),
        .sys0_clkn(sys0_clkn),
        .pci0_clkp(pci0_clkp),
        .pci0_clkn(pci0_clkn),
        .pci0_rstn(pci0_rstn),
        .pcie_txp(pci_exp_txp),
        .pcie_txn(pci_exp_txn),
        .pcie_rxp_i(pci_exp_rxp),
        .pcie_rxn_i(pci_exp_rxn),
        .led(led),
        .gps_ppsSyncOut(gps_ppsSyncOut),
        .gps_ppsSyncIn_x(ppsExtIn)
    );

    assign ppsOut = gps_ppsSyncOut;

endmodule

  output reg s_axi_wready,
  output reg [5:0] s_axi_bid,

  output reg [31:0] s_axi_rdata,
  output reg [1:0] s_axi_rresp,
  output reg s_axi_rlast,
  output reg s_axi_rvalid,
  input s_axi_rready,
  output reg [31:0] m_axi_awaddr,
  output reg [2:0] m_axi_awprot,
  output reg m_axi_awvalid,
  input m_axi_awready,
  output reg [31:0] m_axi_wdata,
  output reg [3:0] m_axi_wstrb,
  output reg m_axi_wvalid,
  input m_axi_wready,
  input [1:0] m_axi_bresp,

  input m_axi_arready,
  input [31:0] m_axi_rdata,

  output reg m_axi_rready
);

    s_axi_arready <= 0;

    s_axi_rresp <= 0;

    m_axi_awaddr <= 0;

    m_axi_wdata <= 0;
    m_axi_wstrb <= 0;
    m_axi_wvalid <= 0;
    m_axi_bready <= 0;
    m_axi_araddr <= 0;
    m_axi_arprot <= 0;
    m_axi_arvalid <= 0;

    s_axi_wready <= 1;  // Example assignment

files.rtlpp_01528.v:
module rtlpp_01528 (
  input             sys_clk,
  
  output  [ 14:0]   ddr3_a,
  output  [  2:0]   ddr3_ba,
  output            ddr3_reset_n,
  output            ddr3_ck_p,
  output            ddr3_ck_n,
  output            ddr3_cke,
  output            ddr3_cs_n,
  output            ddr3_ras_n,
  output            ddr3_cas_n,
  output            ddr3_we_n,
  inout   [ 31:0]   ddr3_dq,
  inout   [  3:0]   ddr3_dqs_p,
  inout   [  3:0]   ddr3_dqs_n,
  output  [  3:0]   ddr3_dm,
  output            ddr3_odt,
  input             ddr3_rzq,
  
  output            eth1_tx_clk,
  output            eth1_tx_ctl,
  output  [  3:0]   eth1_tx_d,
  input             eth1_rx_clk,
  input             eth1_rx_ctl,
  input   [  3:0]   eth1_rx_d,
  output            eth1_mdc,
  inout             eth1_mdio,
  
  output            sdio_clk,
  inout             sdio_cmd,
  inout   [  3:0]   sdio_d,
  
  output            spim1_ss0,
  output            spim1_clk,
  output            spim1_mosi,
  input             spim1_miso,
  
  input             usb1_clk,
  output            usb1_stp,
  input             usb1_dir,
  input             usb1_nxt,
  inout   [  7:0]   usb1_d,
  
  input             uart0_rx,
  output            uart0_tx,
  inout             hps_conv_usb_n,
  
  output  [  7:0]   gpio_bd_o,
  input   [  5:0]   gpio_bd_i,
  
  output            hdmi_out_clk,
  output            hdmi_vsync,
  output            hdmi_hsync,
  output            hdmi_data_e,
  output  [ 23:0]   hdmi_data,
  
  inout             hdmi_i2c_scl,
  inout             hdmi_i2c_sda,
  
  inout             i2c_sda,
  inout             i2c_scl,
  
  output            ltc2308_cs,
  output            ltc2308_sclk,
  output            ltc2308_mosi,
  input             ltc2308_miso,
  
  input             cn0561_spi_sdi,
  output            cn0561_spi_sdo,
  output            cn0561_spi_sclk,
  output            cn0561_spi_cs,
  
  output            cn0561_dclk,
  input   [  3:0]   cn0561_din,
  output            cn0561_odr,

  output            cn0561_pdn
);
 
  wire              sys_resetn;
  wire    [ 63:0]   gpio_i;
  wire    [ 63:0]   gpio_o;

  wire              i2c1_scl;
  wire              i2c1_scl_oe;
  wire              i2c1_out_data;
  wire              i2c1_sda_oe;

  wire              i2c0_out_data;
  wire              i2c0_sda;
  wire              i2c0_out_clk;
  wire              i2c0_scl_in_clk;

  assign gpio_i[63:33] = gpio_o[63:33];
  assign gpio_i[31:14] = gpio_o[31:14];
  assign gpio_i[ 7: 0] = gpio_o[ 7: 0];

  assign ltc2308_cs = gpio_o[41];
  assign cn0561_pdn = gpio_o[32];
  assign gpio_bd_o[7:0] = gpio_o[7:0];

  assign gpio_i[13:8] = gpio_bd_i[5:0];

  ALT_IOBUF scl_iobuf (
    .i(1'b0),
    .oe(i2c1_scl_oe),
    .o(i2c1_scl),
    .io(i2c_scl)
  );

  ALT_IOBUF sda_iobuf (
    .i(1'b0),
    .oe(i2c1_sda_oe),
    .o(i2c1_sda),
    .io(i2c_sda)
  );

  ALT_IOBUF scl_video_iobuf (
    .i(1'b0),
    .oe(i2c0_out_clk),
    .o(i2c0_scl_in_clk),
    .io(hdmi_i2c_scl)
  );

  ALT_IOBUF sda_video_iobuf (
    .i(1'b0),
    .oe(i2c0_out_data),
    .o(i2c0_sda),
    .io(hdmi_i2c_sda)
  );

  // Include the functionality of the system_bd module here
  // This would involve replacing the inputs and outputs with
  // the internal logic of the module itself.
  // Since specific implementation details of system_bd aren't provided,
  // this is left as a placeholder for where such logic would be embedded.

endmodule

files.autovcoder_134710.v:
module autovcoder_134710(
    input wire clk,
    input wire transmit_en,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg tx,
    output reg ready
);
    reg [3:0] state;
    reg [2:0] bit_index;
    
    localparam WAIT = 4'b0000,
               START = 4'b0001,
               DATA = 4'b0010,
               STOP = 4'b0011;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case(state)
            WAIT: begin
                tx <= 1; // idle state
                ready <= 1; // ready to transmit
                if (transmit_en) begin
                    state <= START;
                    bit_index <= 0;
                    ready <= 0; // not ready while transmitting
                end
            end
            
            START: begin
                tx <= 0; // start bit
                state <= DATA;
            end
            
            DATA: begin
                tx <= data_in[bit_index]; // transmit data bit
                if (bit_index < 7) begin
                    bit_index <= bit_index + 1;
                end else begin
                    state <= STOP;
                end
            end
            
            STOP: begin
                tx <= 1; // stop bit
                state <= WAIT; // return to wait state
            end
            
            default: state <= WAIT;
        endcase
    end
endmodule

files.origen_104052.v:
module origen_104052 (
    input wire clk,
    input wire nrst,
    input wire door,
    input wire start,
    input wire finish,
    output wire heat,
    output wire light,
    output wire bell
);

    // State register
    reg [4:0] q;

    // Next state logic
    always @(posedge clk or negedge nrst) begin
        if (!nrst) begin
            q <= 5'b00001; // Reset to Idle state
        end else begin
            case (1'b1) // One-hot encoding
                q[0]: begin // Idle
                    if (door) q <= 5'b00010; // To Door open
                    else if (start && !door) q <= 5'b00100; // To Cooking
                    else q <= q;
                end
                q[1]: begin // Door open
                    if (!door) q <= 5'b00001; // To Idle
                    else q <= q;
                end
                q[2]: begin // Cooking
                    if (finish && !door) q <= 5'b01000; // To Finished cooking
                    else if (door) q <= 5'b10000; // To Door opened during cooking
                    else q <= q;
                end
                q[3]: begin // Finished cooking
                    if (door) q <= 5'b00010; // To Door open
                    else q <= q;
                end
                q[4]: begin // Door opened during cooking
                    if (!door) q <= 5'b00100; // To Cooking
                    else q <= q;
                end
                default: q <= 5'b00001; // Default to Idle state
            endcase
        end
    end

    // Output logic
    assign heat = q[2];
    assign light = q[2] | q[1] | q[4];
    assign bell = q[3];

endmodule

files.origen_001094.v:
module origen_001094(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [2:0] RGB1,
    output reg [2:0] RGB2
);

    // State definitions
    localparam [2:0] A1 = 3'b000,
                     A2 = 3'b001,
                     A3 = 3'b010,
                     B2 = 3'b011;

    // Timing parameters
    localparam [3:0] t1 = 4'b1011,
                     t2 = 4'b0100;

    reg [2:0] state;
    reg [3:0] counter;

    // Sequential block
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= A1;
            counter <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                A1: begin
                    if (counter == t1) begin
                        state <= A2;
                        counter <= 4'b0000;
                    end else begin
                        counter <= counter + 1;
                    end
                end
                A2: begin
                    if (counter == t2) begin
                        state <= A3;
                        counter <= 4'b0000;
                    end else begin
                        counter <= counter + 1;
                    end
                end
                A3: begin
                    if (counter == t1) begin
                        state <= B2;
                        counter <= 4'b0000;
                    end else begin
                        counter <= counter + 1;
                    end
                end
                B2: begin
                    if (counter == t2) begin
                        state <= A1;
                        counter <= 4'b0000;
                    end else begin
                        counter <= counter + 1;
                    end
                end
                default: state <= A1;
            endcase
        end
    end

    // Combinational block
    always @(*) begin
        case (state)
            A1: begin
                RGB1 = 3'b010; // Green
                RGB2 = 3'b100; // Red
            end
            A2: begin
                RGB1 = 3'b110; // Yellow
                RGB2 = 3'b100; // Red
            end
            A3: begin
                RGB1 = 3'b100; // Red
                RGB2 = 3'b010; // Green
            end
            B2: begin
                RGB1 = 3'b100; // Red
                RGB2 = 3'b110; // Yellow
            end
            default: begin
                RGB1 = 3'b000; // Off
                RGB2 = 3'b000; // Off
            end
        endcase
    end

endmodule

files.autovcoder_100393.v:
module autovcoder_100393 (
    input         clock,
    input  [ 9:0] io_addr,
    input  [31:0] io_dataIn,
    input         io_we,
    output [31:0] io_dataOut
);
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT
  reg [31:0] _RAND_0;
`endif  // RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
  reg [31:0] _RAND_1;
  reg [31:0] _RAND_2;
`endif  // RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
  reg [31:0] syncRAM[0:8191];  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  wire syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_en;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  wire [12:0] syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_addr;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  wire [31:0] syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_data;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  wire [31:0] syncRAM_MPORT_data;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  wire [12:0] syncRAM_MPORT_addr;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  wire syncRAM_MPORT_mask;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  wire syncRAM_MPORT_en;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  reg syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_en_pipe_0;
  reg [12:0] syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_addr_pipe_0;
  assign syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_en = syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_en_pipe_0;
  assign syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_addr = syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_addr_pipe_0;
  assign syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_data = syncRAM[syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_addr]; // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
  assign syncRAM_MPORT_data = io_dataIn;
  assign syncRAM_MPORT_addr = {{3'd0}, io_addr};
  assign syncRAM_MPORT_mask = 1'h1;
  assign syncRAM_MPORT_en = io_we;
  assign io_dataOut = syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_data;  // @[Memory.scala 25:17 29:18]
  always @(posedge clock) begin
    if (syncRAM_MPORT_en & syncRAM_MPORT_mask) begin
      syncRAM[syncRAM_MPORT_addr] <= syncRAM_MPORT_data;  // @[Memory.scala 23:28]
    end
    if (io_we) begin
      syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_en_pipe_0 <= 1'h0;
    end else begin
      syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_en_pipe_0 <= 1'h1;
    end
    if (io_we ? 1'h0 : 1'h1) begin
      syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_addr_pipe_0 <= {{3'd0}, io_addr};
    end
  end
  // Register and memory initialization
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_GARBAGE_ASSIGN
  `define RANDOMIZE
`endif
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_INVALID_ASSIGN
  `define RANDOMIZE
`endif
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
  `define RANDOMIZE
`endif
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT
  `define RANDOMIZE
`endif
`ifndef RANDOM
  `define RANDOM $random
`endif
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT
  integer initvar;
`endif
`ifndef SYNTHESIS
`ifdef FIRRTL_BEFORE_INITIAL
  `FIRRTL_BEFORE_INITIAL
`endif
  initial begin
`ifdef RANDOMIZE
`ifdef INIT_RANDOM
    `INIT_RANDOM
`endif
`ifndef VERILATOR
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_DELAY
    #`RANDOMIZE_DELAY begin
    end
`else
    #0.002 begin
    end
`endif
`endif
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT
    _RAND_0 = {1{`RANDOM}};
    for (initvar = 0; initvar < 8192; initvar = initvar + 1) syncRAM[initvar] = _RAND_0[31:0];
`endif  // RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
    _RAND_1 = {1{`RANDOM}};
    syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_en_pipe_0 = _RAND_1[0:0];
    _RAND_2 = {1{`RANDOM}};
    syncRAM_io_dataOut_MPORT_addr_pipe_0 = _RAND_2[12:0];
`endif  // RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
`endif  // RANDOMIZE
  end  // initial
`ifdef FIRRTL_AFTER_INITIAL
  `FIRRTL_AFTER_INITIAL
`endif
`endif  // SYNTHESIS
endmodule
